text:
Hepatitis B - acute - Combined Medicare & Medicaid Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
HEPB_ACT_MEDICARE_EVER Hepatitis B - acute - Medicare Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
HEPB_ACT_MEDICAID_EVER Hepatitis B - acute - Medicaid Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
HEPB_ACT_COMBINED_EVER Hepatitis B - acute - Combined Medicare & Medicaid Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date -
